channel.title: Posts on Siddharth Dushantha
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Siddharth Dushantha

item.title: Reflected XSS and HTML injection on netlife.no
item.description: On the 22nd of October I was successfully able to find out that netlife.no was vulnerable to HTML injection and reflected XSS. So you might be wondering why did I target Netlife? Well it had only been a few weeks since we had school photos taken and after a few days we were told to go to fotonorden.no where we had to put in a code and then could see our images and Foto Norden used Netlife’s service to show and sell the photos to us.
